# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myVNet
  resourceGroupName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myResourceGroup
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: eastus

variables:
  vnetId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  storageServiceEndpointId: "[concat(variables('vnetId'), '/subnets/StorageSubnet')]"
  sqlServiceEndpointId: "[concat(variables('vnetId'), '/subnets/SqlSubnet')]"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - "10.0.0.0/16"
    subnets:
      - name: "StorageSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "10.0.1.0/24"
          serviceEndpoints:
            - type: "Microsoft.Storage"
              endpoints:
                - "10.0.1.0/24"
          delegations:
            - name: "StorageDelegation"
              properties:
                serviceName: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
      - name: "SqlSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "10.0.2.0/24"
          serviceEndpoints:
            - type: "Microsoft.Sql"
              endpoints:
                - "10.0.2.0/24"
          delegations:
            - name: "SqlDelegation"
              properties:
                serviceName: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
      - name: "DefaultSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "10.0.3.0/24"
          serviceEndpoints:
            - type: "Microsoft.Storage"
              endpoints:
                - "10.0.3.0/24"
            - type: "Microsoft.Sql"
              endpoints:
                - "10.0.3.0/24"

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "mystorageaccount"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    accessTier: "Hot"
    accountType: "Standard_LRS"
    networkAcls:
      bypass: "AzureServices"
      defaultAction: "Allow"
      ipRules: []
      virtualNetworkRules:
        - virtualNetworkResourceId: "[variables('vnetId')]"
          action: "Allow"
          subnet:
            id: "[variables('storageServiceEndpointId')]"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
  apiVersion: "2020-11-01-preview"
  name: "mysqlserver"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    administratorLogin: "adminuser"
    administratorLoginPassword: "SecurePassword123!"
    version: "12.0"
    publicNetworkAccess: "Enabled"
    serverVersion: "12.0"
    networkAcls:
      defaultAction: "Allow"
      bypass: "AzureServices"
      virtualNetworkRules:
        - virtualNetworkResourceId: "[variables('vnetId')]"
          action: "Allow"
          subnet:
            id: "[variables('sqlServiceEndpointId')]"

- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/StorageSubnet')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  properties:
    addressPrefix: "10.0.1.0/24"
    serviceEndpoints:
      - type: "Microsoft.Storage"
        endpoints:
          - "10.0.1.0/24"
    delegations:
      - name: "StorageDelegation"
        properties:
          serviceName: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/SqlSubnet')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  properties:
    addressPrefix: "10.0.2.0/24"
    serviceEndpoints:
      - type: "Microsoft.Sql"
        endpoints:
          - "10.0.2.0/24"
    delegations:
      - name: "SqlDelegation"
        properties:
          serviceName: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
